reported.definition: Data point is fully disclosed with quantified values and methodology

partial.definition: Data point is partially disclosed — some information available but incomplete coverage, missing methodology detail, or limited scope

missing.definition: Data point is not disclosed or not found in the sustainability report

N/A.definition: Data point is not applicable to this entity type (e.g. Part C for banks)

critical.condition: Score 0-1 AND high materiality for entity type
examples: No Part C reporting for insurer

high.condition: Score 0-1 AND medium materiality for entity type

medium.action: Planned improvement — on path but needs enhancement

low.action: Continuous improvement — meets minimum, opportunity to lead

no_pcaf_adoption.title: PCAF Methodology Not Adopted
no_pcaf_adoption.description: Institution has not adopted the PCAF standard for measuring financed emissions. This is a foundational gap that prevents compliance with GHG Protocol Category 15 requirements.
no_pcaf_adoption.recommendation: Join PCAF as a signatory and begin implementation with a phased approach starting from the most material asset classes.

no_financed_emissions.title: No Financed Emissions Reported
no_financed_emissions.description: Institution mentions PCAF but does not report quantified financed emissions. Without absolute emissions figures, compliance assessment is incomplete.
no_financed_emissions.recommendation: Calculate and disclose total financed emissions using PCAF methodology, starting with the largest asset classes by exposure.

missing_dqs.title: No Data Quality Scores Reported
missing_dqs.description: Institution reports financed emissions but does not provide PCAF Data Quality Scores. DQS is essential for assessing the reliability of reported figures.
missing_dqs.recommendation: Assign PCAF Data Quality Scores (1-5) per asset class and disclose weighted average DQS.

limited_asset_class_coverage.title: Limited Asset Class Coverage
limited_asset_class_coverage.description: Institution covers fewer than 5 of the 10 PCAF asset classes. Significant portfolio emissions may be unaccounted for.
limited_asset_class_coverage.recommendation: Expand coverage to include all material asset classes, prioritizing by portfolio exposure size.

no_part_b_reporting.title: No Part B (Facilitated Emissions) Reporting
no_part_b_reporting.description: Bank does not report facilitated emissions from capital market activities. Part B is material for institutions with significant underwriting/advisory activities.
no_part_b_reporting.recommendation: Implement PCAF Part B methodology for capital market issuances and advisory services.

no_part_c_reporting.title: No Part C (Insurance-Associated Emissions) Reporting
no_part_c_reporting.description: Insurer/reinsurer does not report insurance-associated emissions. Part C is a core requirement for insurance entities under PCAF.
no_part_c_reporting.recommendation: Implement PCAF Part C methodology starting with the most material insurance lines.

scope_1_2_only.title: Only Scope 1 and 2 Covered in Financed Emissions
scope_1_2_only.description: Institution only covers investee Scope 1 and 2 emissions in financed emissions calculations, missing material Scope 3 emissions.
scope_1_2_only.recommendation: Extend financed emissions calculation to include investee Scope 3 emissions for high-impact sectors.

no_sovereign_debt.title: Sovereign Debt Not Included
no_sovereign_debt.description: Sovereign debt emissions are not tracked or disclosed. For institutions with significant sovereign bond holdings, this may be a material omission.
no_sovereign_debt.recommendation: Implement PCAF sovereign debt methodology using production-based or consumption-based approaches.

poor_data_quality.title: Low Data Quality (DQS 4-5)
poor_data_quality.description: Institution relies primarily on proxy or estimated data (DQS 4-5). This indicates reliance on economic activity data rather than reported emissions.
poor_data_quality.recommendation: Develop a data quality improvement roadmap targeting DQS 2-3 within 2 years through enhanced data collection and vendor engagement.

no_intensity_metrics.title: No Intensity Metrics Reported
no_intensity_metrics.description: Institution does not report emissions intensity metrics alongside absolute figures. Intensity metrics enable better comparability and target-setting.
no_intensity_metrics.recommendation: Report PCAF Economic Carbon Intensity (ECI) and sector-specific metrics (WACI, per EVIC) alongside absolute emissions.
